sys_script_include.description:
Orchestrates CMDB location hierarchy sync operations. Owns the event names, dedicated queue, and all CMDB interaction for this feature:
- syncCI: queue a hierarchy re-sync event for a single CI - syncLocation: queue a location structure-change event — consumed asynchronously by the Script Action - syncAffectedCIs: fan out to all CIs referencing a location (direct or via u_* fields) and queue a sync event for each — called by the Script Action - applyHierarchy: translate a resolved hierarchy object to cmdb_ci field values and save the CI — skips update if no fields changed - refresh: five location-type-based catch-up queries plus a catch-all for non-standard location types (e.g. plant, factory), for CIs with missing u_* fields — used by the Scheduled Job
sys_script_include.name: STLACMDBLocationSync
